perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a middle-aged male host wearing a red shirt, glasses, and a plaid cap, gesturing with his hands while speaking to the camera in front of a gray curtain background. (2) The scene cuts to B-roll footage showing news reports and examples of women using beauty filters; the host remains visible in a small circular inset at the bottom right of the screen. (3) The visual shifts to show the host's phone screen where he demonstrates a filter application that distorts his face into a cartoonish or enhanced appearance. (4) The host returns to full-screen focus, continuing his address to the audience and concludes by pointing towards the viewer.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A male voice speaks energetically in Mandarin throughout the video. An upbeat, medium-tempo electronic background music track starts immediately. (2) The vocal remains at a high volume relative to the music, maintaining a professional yet conversational tone. (3) No significant ambient noise or environmental sounds are heard, suggesting a quiet studio recording. (4) A subtle sound effect (SFX) occurs during transitions and text pop-ups, while the music stays consistent until the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative/Hook Text: 'TikTok針對18歲以下的青少年祭出新規定!' - Informative and attention-grabbing. (2) Functional Text: '由於現在各種美顏濾鏡盛行' - Explanatory. (3) Functional Text: '對於自己的外表感到焦慮' - Reflective/Empathetic. (4) Functional Text: '禁止使用人工放大眼睛、豐唇、平滑的皮膚' - Factual and descriptive. (5) Decorative Text: '留言告訴我你的想法' - Engaging and encouraging.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro Hook -> Problem Context -> Policy Explanation -> In-app Demo -> Outro Call-to-action

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male host, 3 females appearing in background B-roll news footage
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Middle-aged male wearing a plaid flat cap, glasses, a red long-sleeved shirt, and beaded bracelets on his wrist.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A simple indoor setting with vertical gray pleated curtains. B-roll segments show news broadcast clips and smartphone app interfaces.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to inform the audience about TikTok's new policy restricting the use of certain AI beauty filters for users under 18. By highlighting the psychological impact of filter-induced anxiety and demonstrating the changes, the host encourages viewers to engage in a discussion about social media regulation and its effects on youth.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video is a news commentary piece rather than a product promotion.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Host's signature flat cap and red shirt; consistent use of circular PiP (Picture-in-Picture) during B-roll.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video leverages current tech trends and social issues (body dysmorphia/filter anxiety) to drive engagement on social media platforms.
